nasb.text: ‘Thus says the Lord God, “The gate of the inner court facing east shall be shut the six working days; but it shall be opened on the sabbath day and opened on the day of the new moon.

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord God: The gate of the inner court that faces east shall be shut on the six working days, but on the Sabbath day it shall be opened, and on the day of the new moon it shall be opened.

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說：“內院朝東的門，在工作的六天裡，必須關閉，在安息日卻要打開，在月朔之日也要打開。

ccb.text: “主耶和华说，‘圣殿内院的东门在平时工作的六日内都要关闭，只在安息日和朔日才打开。
